summary: Iteration 58: Backend Testing for Drilling Protocol Fixes and Case Report PDF - 17/17 tests PASSED (100%). All requested features verified: Alpha-Bio SPI 6.0mm D3 returns 6 steps with 4.1mm drill, Ankylos D1 includes Tap, D2 has no Tap, D3/D4 skip Conical Reamer, Neodent Helix GM 3.5mm D1 returns 2.0->3.5 (no 2.8 step), Case-report PDF endpoint returns valid PDF, Login works with test credentials.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Alpha-Bio SPI 6.0mm D3): PASS - Returns 6 steps including 4.1mm drill
Feature 2 (Ankylos D1 includes Tap): PASS - Tap step present in D1 protocol
Feature 3 (Ankylos D2 no Tap): PASS - Tap step NOT present in D2 protocol
Feature 4 (Ankylos D3 skips Conical Reamer): PASS - Conical Reamer NOT present in D3 protocol
Feature 5 (Ankylos D4 skips Conical Reamer): PASS - Conical Reamer NOT present in D4 protocol
Feature 6 (Neodent Helix GM 3.5mm D1 no 2.8 step): PASS - Sequence is 2.0->3.5 without 2.8mm
Feature 7 (Case-report PDF endpoint): PASS - Returns valid PDF (200 OK) with proper content
Feature 8 (GET /api/procedures): PASS - Returns procedure list with implant_site field
Feature 9 (Login credentials): PASS - Both student and admin logins work correctly
seed_data_creation: No test data created - read-only tests on drilling protocol generation and existing procedure
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drilling protocol fixes verified: (1) Alpha-Bio SPI 6.0mm D3 soft bone returns 6 steps [2.0, 2.8, 3.2, 3.65, 4.1] + implant placement, (2) Ankylos C/X: D1 includes Tap, D2 has no Tap, D3/D4 skip Conical Reamer, (3) Neodent Helix GM 3.5mm D1 returns 2.0->3.5 sequence without 2.8mm step. Case-report PDF endpoint at POST /api/procedures/{id}/case-report returns valid PDF. Test procedure ID 69c2bbfb5494f24c1d483713 used for case-report testing.

tested_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: 200 - Authentication working for both student and admin
